---
title: "w11l2_act.qmd"
author: "Steph Krieger"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---
```{r}
library(mlbench)
library(tidyverse)
data(BostonHousing2)
```

```{r}
BHsmall <- BostonHousing2 |> 
  select(medv, crim, nox, indus) |>
  slice(1:5)
```

```{r}
outliers <- function(x) {

# Step 1: Find Q1, Q3, and the IQR
quarts <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.75))
iqr <- quarts[2] - quarts[1]

# Step 2: Find the bounds
ub <- quarts[2] + 1.5 * iqr
lb <- quarts[1] - 1.5 * iqr

# Step 3: Show the outliers
inds <- which(x < lb | x > ub)
BHsmall |> slice(inds) |>  head(3)

}
```


```{r}
for(item in BHsmall){
  print(outliers(item))
}
```

```{r}
BHsmall |>
  map(mean)
```
```{r}
sub_two_vectors <- function(x, y){
  x - y
}

map2(BHsmall$medv, BHsmall$indus, sub_two_vectors)
  
```
